name_en: 【Dynamic Code Chip Top-tier Original Single Enhanced Version】M44 White with Pink M4 Black M477 Apricot M47 Elephant Grey CarryAll Small Handbag crafted from Monogram Empreinte embossed leather, featuring a spacious layout with a neat interior and a large interior pocket for added functionality. Paired with a Monogram embossed clutch secured by a leather strap. The perfect companion for urban life. Dimensions 9 x 4 x cm (Length x Height x Width)
